calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Debra Dolch.

The Court stated that there is an issue with the measurement of the 1% fee. Ms. Rasch reported that Ms. Dolch checks her time at the end of the case and if it is the same as the hourly will ask for the 1%, that because of the lag time between filing the petition and the hearing Ms. Dolch is working during that time without compensation, that her fees go to the end of the accounting period and do not include the accounting preparation, that those fees are charged later. The court stated that the 1% is to be measured at the end of the accounting and that the order did not provide for an interim payment. Ms. Rasch suggested that the accounting be approved and that the compensation be deferred so that distribution to the beneficiaries is not held up and that they are amenable to a reduction on the fees for Wendy Segal. The Court stated that the reduction in Ms. Segal's fees will actually be less that what was indicated in the examiner's notes. Ms. Rasch stated that if Ms. Dolch charges an hourly fee Ms. Segal's time will not be an issue. The court stated that there is no petition setting out a reserve or making a claim before it. Ms. Dolch stated that the beneficiaries have waited a long time, she does not want her fees to hold up their distribution and agreed to the court adjusting her fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Bringing Trust Under Court Supervision And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-13-2011 Continued To Jan-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PCN-11-294747 Conservatorship of Bereni Karasik.

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Debra Dolch.

The Petition for Authority to Sell Real Property, etc. in the Conservatorhsip matter was granted (subject to review of the order). The Court also granted the Petition for Order Bringing the Trust Under Court Supervision in the Trust matter. The portion of the petition with regard to Appointment of a Successor Trustee was continued to January 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Parties to clear up title. Therefore, the entire underlying petition was continued to that date. Ms. Rasch will file an Ex Parte Petition to Appoint Debra Dolch as Temporary Trustee Pursuant to Stipulation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.

Petition For Order Bringing Trust Under Court Supervision And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Continued To Dec-13-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
